body.docName: 新建预付款单（草稿，审批通过）
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/supplier-lend/create 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/supplier-lend/create 
 ## 接口描述 
支持系统调用接口新增审批通过的预付款单

**自定义字段传值格式和说明如下：**

| 字段类型 | 说明                                                         | fieldValue示例                                               |
| -------- | ------------------------------------------------------------ | ------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 单行文本 | 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入          | 单行文本11                                                   |
| 多行文本 | 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入          | 多行文本11                                                   |
| 数字     | 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入    | 8.6                                                          |
| 金额     | 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入    | 9.6                                                          |
| 单选     | 选项值，value以字符串格式传入                                | 选项1                                                        |
| 多选     | 选项值，value以Json格式字符串传入                            | [\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]                                       |
| 下拉选择 | 支持单/多选，以自定义字段配置为准, value 以选项值传入 Json格式字符串 | [\"选项1\", \"选项2\"]                                       |
| 手机号码 | value以字符串格式传入                                        | 18858885666                                                  |
| 日期选择 | 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式传入        | 2023-08-01 12:30                                             |
| 日期区间 | 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式，用","拼接传入 | 2023-08-01 12:30,2023-08-02 12:30                            |
| 银行卡号 | value以字符串格式传入                                        | 6222252225436456                                             |
| 邮箱     | value以字符串格式传入                                        | 123456@163.com                                               |
| 附件     | 附件编号，value以字符串格式传入                                 |[\"4960216b-8dd9-499e-86f2-3035c9445c96\", \"4960216b-8dd9-499e-86f2-3035c9445c96\"]
| 层级选择 | 选项层级、选项值，以及和选项路径所有节点的选项层级、选项值。选项层级以数字传入，选项值为字符串 | [{\"level\": \"1\", \"value\": \"选项1\"}, {\"level\": \"2\", \"value:\": \"选项1-1\"}] |
| 关联字段 | value以字符串格式传入                                        | 关联字段值                                                   |
| 表格     | 每一行根据序号值区分，每一行中，每个表格值将titleCode和value 传入 Json格式字符串 | [{\"sequence\": 1, \"columnValues\": [{\"titleCode\": \"NAME\", \"value\": \"张三\"}, {\"titleCode\": \"AGE\", \"value\": \"26\"}]},{\"sequence\": 2, \"columnValues\": [{\"titleCode\": \"NAME\", \"value\": \"李四\"}, {\"titleCode\": \"AGE\", \"value\": \"28\"}]}] |
| 人员     | value 以花名册编号传入 Json格式字符串                        | [\"EMP_NUMBER_01\", \"EMP_NUMBER_02\"]                       |
| 单据部门 | 组织编码以字符串形式传入                                     | 00000001                                                     |
| 单据项目 | value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串                           | [\"PROJECT_1\", \"PROJECT_2\"]                               |
| 关联单据 | 费控系统单据编号，以字符串形式传入                           | 2023080202288221                                             |
| 申请金额 | 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入    | 66\.6                                                        |
| 城市     | 城市编码，以字符串形式传入                                   | 20                                                           |
| 供应商   | value以供应商编号传入                                        | SUP20211109091900                                            |
| 客户     | value以客户编号传入 Json格式字符串                           | [\"CUSTOMER_01\", \"CUSTOMER_02\"]                           |
| 合同     | value以合同编号传入                                          | 8768768768768                                                |
| 成本中心 | value以成本中心编号传入                                      | center001                                                    |
| 档案选择 | value以自定义档案选项编码传入                                | option01                                                     |
| 部门     | value以薪福通组织编码传入 Json格式字符串                     | [\"ORG_01\", \"ORG_02\"]                                     |
| 项目     | value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串                           | [\"PROJECT_1\", \"PROJECT_2\"]                               |
| 事业部   | value以薪福通组织编码传入                                    | 00000211                                                     |
| 事项     | 配置为必填时，业务类型编码必传，且下级存在事项和事由时，事项编码和事由编码必传。value以“业务类型编码,事项编码,事由编码”传入 Json格式字符串 | [\"MATTER_TYPE_1\", \"MATTER_MISSION_1\", \"MATTER_DETAIL_1\"] |
| 收款账户 | value以个人或供应商银行账户号，开户行，户名传入 Json格式字符串；匹配启用状态的个人或供应商收款账户 | [\"62256255478532541\", \"中国银行\", \"小朱\"]              | 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"billAccount","required":false,"label":"%E6%94%B6%E6%AC%BE%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"account","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"0000000000111","desc":"%20%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82billAccount%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoBank","required":false,"label":"%E5%BC%80%E6%88%B7%E8%A1%8C","exampleValue":"%E6%8B%9B%E5%95%86%E9%93%B6%E8%A1%8C","desc":"%20%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82billAccount%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"depoName","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%A6%E6%88%B7%E5%90%8D","exampleValue":"%E5%B0%8F%E8%9C%9C%E8%9C%82%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%861","desc":"%20%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82billAccount%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":"100"}}],"open":false},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billCompanyCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"SH01","desc":"%20%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E6%B3%95%E4%BA%BA%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%EF%BC%9B%0A%0A%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E4%B8%8E%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0%0A%0AbillDepartmentCode%E5%92%8CbillCompanyCode%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billDepartmentCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"0000","desc":"%20%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E7%BB%84%E7%BB%87%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E4%B8%BA%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%EF%BC%9B%0A%0A%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E4%B8%8E%E7%94%B3%E8%AF%B7%E4%BA%BA%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%80%E8%87%B4%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7%E5%BF%85%E4%BC%A0%0A%0AbillDepartmentCode%E5%92%8CbillCompanyCode%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E6%88%96%E8%80%85%E5%90%8C%E6%97%B6%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billStatus","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"APPRV","desc":"%20DRAFT%EF%BC%9A%E8%8D%89%E7%A8%BF%EF%BC%9BAPPRV%EF%BC%9A%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E9%80%9A%E8%BF%87%0A","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customFieldValues","required":false,"label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E8%8D%89%E7%A8%BF%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%94%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E4%B8%BA%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldNumber","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"MULTI_INPUT_170948711","desc":"%20%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82customFieldValues%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fieldValue","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"%E5%A4%9A%E8%A1%8C%E6%96%87%E6%9C%AC","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E5%8F%82%E8%80%83%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E6%8F%8F%E8%BF%B0%E4%B8%AD%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E6%A0%BC%E5%BC%8F%E5%92%8C%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%0D%0A%0D%0A"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNumber","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"00210416","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"skipPayment","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B7%B3%E8%BF%87%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98","exampleValue":"ON","desc":"%20ON%20%E8%B7%B3%E8%BF%87%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%EF%BC%8C%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%8E%E5%8E%86%E5%8F%B2%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%0AOFF%20%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%E6%94%AF%E4%BB%98%20%E6%96%B0%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE","maxLength":"3"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"eventNumber","required":true,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E8%A1%A8%E5%8D%95%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"03240527142240000001","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"lendPay","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E4%BB%98%E6%AC%BE%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E9%9D%9E%E8%8D%89%E7%A8%BF%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA%0A"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"contractNbr","required":false,"label":"%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1234567890","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"currencyCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D","exampleValue":"CNY","desc":"%20%E5%8F%82%E7%85%A7%E8%B4%B9%E6%8E%A7%E5%B8%81%E7%A7%8D%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0A%0A%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82lendPay%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA%0A","maxLength":"3"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"expenseTypeList","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%8F%82%E7%85%A7%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%9A%84%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%EF%BC%8C%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0A%0A%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82lendPay%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA%0A"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expId","required":false,"label":"%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"16","desc":"%20%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82expenseTypeList%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":"25"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"lendReason","required":false,"label":"%E5%86%8D%E9%A2%84%E4%BB%98%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0","exampleValue":"8888","desc":"%20%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82lendPay%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%94%E5%80%9F%E6%AC%BE%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E6%8F%90%E4%BA%A4%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%3Dreason%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%BF%85%E5%A1%AB","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"lendTypeCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%80%9F%E6%AC%BE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"32424SDFFF","desc":"%20%E5%8F%82%E7%85%A7%E5%80%9F%E6%AC%BE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%E9%A1%B5%E9%9D%A2%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0A%0A%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82lendPay%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA%0A","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"repaymentDate","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%98%E6%AC%BE%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2024-05-28","desc":"%20yyyy-mm-dd"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"arriveTicketDate","required":false,"label":"%E5%88%B0%E7%A5%A8%E6%97%A5%E6%9C%9F","exampleValue":"2024-05-28","desc":"%20yyyy-mm-dd"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"originalLendAmount","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E4%BB%98%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"16","desc":"%20%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82lendPay%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%94%E5%A4%A7%E4%BA%8E0","maxLength":"(8,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BIGDECIMAL","name":"originalPaidAmount","required":false,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E4%BB%98%E5%B7%B2%E8%BF%98%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D","exampleValue":"0","desc":"%20%E5%A4%A7%E4%BA%8E%E7%AD%89%E4%BA%8E%E9%A2%84%E4%BB%98%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E7%AD%89%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%8E%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E6%8D%A2%E5%AE%8C%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%B3%E9%A2%84%E4%BB%98%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%0A%E5%B0%8F%E4%BA%8E%E9%A2%84%E4%BB%98%E9%87%91%E9%A2%9D%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E7%AD%89%E5%90%8C%E4%BA%8E%E6%B2%A1%E6%9C%89%E8%BF%98%EF%BC%8C%E5%8D%B30%0A%0A%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82lendPay%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%94%E5%A4%A7%E4%BA%8E%E7%AD%89%E4%BA%8E0","maxLength":"(8,2)"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"payStageNam","required":false,"label":"%E6%9D%A1%E6%AC%BE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"03%E6%9D%A1%E6%AC%BE","desc":"%20%E6%9C%89%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%94%E5%90%88%E5%90%8C%E4%B8%8B%E6%9C%89%E6%9D%A1%E6%AC%BE%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA","maxLength":"200"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"supId","required":false,"label":"%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUP20220923150520","desc":"%20%E5%A4%96%E5%B1%82lendPay%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%E8%AF%A5%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E9%9D%9E%E7%A9%BA%0A","maxLength":"100"}}],"open":false},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"outRelId","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%96%E9%83%A8%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1111111","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"checkDuplicateOutRelId","maxLength":"5","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E7%9A%84%E5%A4%96%E9%83%A8%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%3A%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%EF%BC%8C%20false%EF%BC%9A%E4%B8%8D%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%EF%BC%8C%20%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E6%97%B6%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4false"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billApplyAuthCheckType","maxLength":"1","label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E5%8F%91%E8%B5%B7%E6%9D%83%E9%99%90","exampleValue":"Y","desc":"%20Y%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%20N%20%E4%B8%8D%E9%9C%80%E8%A6%81%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C%0D%0A%E5%8F%AA%E6%9C%89%E5%85%8D%E5%AE%A1%E6%89%B9%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E6%89%8D%E5%8F%AF%E4%BB%A5%E4%BC%A0N%E4%B8%8D%E6%A0%A1%E9%AA%8C"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E5%8D%95%E6%8D%AE%E7%BC%96%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"2024052803047402","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
    "billAccount": {
        "account": "75594438652210006",
        "depoBank": "招商银行",
        "depoName": "招商银行应付代发业务清算款(薪福通客户)"
    },
    "billApplyAuthCheckType": "N",
    "billCompanyCode": "F000001",
    "billDepartmentCode": "0000",
    "billStatus": "APPRV",
    "customFieldValues": [
        {
            "fieldNumber": "INPUT_145920390",
            "fieldValue": "这是单行文本"
        },
        {
            "fieldNumber": "INFINITY_SELECT_145945623",
            "fieldValue": "[\"选项3\"]"
        },
        {
            "fieldNumber": "ADV_STAFF_150310586",
            "fieldValue": "[\"00010\"]"
        }
    ],
    "empNumber": "2383V123",
    "skipPayment": "OFF",
    "eventNumber": "03240506165658000003",
    "lendPay": {
        "contractNbr": "202403130002",
        "currencyCode": "CNY",
        "expenseTypeList": [],
        "lendReason": "8888",
        "lendTypeCode": "JK00006",
        "repaymentDate": "2024-05-28",
        "arriveTicketDate": "2024-05-28",
        "originalLendAmount": 1,
        "originalPaidAmount": 1,
        "payStageNam": "交付节点",
        "supId": "SUP20230629184159"
    },
    "outRelId": "1111111",
    "checkDuplicateOutRelId": false
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": 2024052803047402,
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | E0001| 单据公司和单据部门需要同时指定或者同时为空 |
| E0001| 请传入企业用户ID|
| E0001| 请传入花名册员工号|
| E0001| 请传入正确的员工匹配规则|
| E0001| 暂不支持除草稿、待审批、审批通过之外的单据状态|
| E0001| 表单不存在|
| E0001| 请填写正确的预付金额 |
| E0001| 请填写正确的已核销金额|
| E0001| 已核销金额不能大于预付金额 |
| E0001| 存在前款未清，禁止提交|
| E0001| 请填写预付理由|
| E0001| 您选择的币种不可用,请确认后重试|
| E0001| 预付款单本位币计算出错，请刷新后重试|
| E0001| 选择的合同不存在 |
| E0001| 合同的乙方公司和所选供应商未对应|
| E0001| 合同条款不存在|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/supplier-lend/create

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/supplier-lend/create

接口描述

支持系统调用接口新增审批通过的预付款单

自定义字段传值格式和说明如下：

字段类型 说明 fieldValue示例
单行文本 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 单行文本11
多行文本 长度限制以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 多行文本11
数字 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 8.6
金额 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 9.6
单选 选项值，value以字符串格式传入 选项1
多选 选项值，value以Json格式字符串传入 ["选项1", "选项2"]
下拉选择 支持单/多选，以自定义字段配置为准, value 以选项值传入 Json格式字符串 ["选项1", "选项2"]
手机号码 value以字符串格式传入 18858885666
日期选择 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式传入 2023-08-01 12:30
日期区间 以自定义字段配置为准, value以yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm格式，用","拼接传入 2023-08-01 12:30,2023-08-02 12:30
银行卡号 value以字符串格式传入 6222252225436456
邮箱 value以字符串格式传入 123456@163.com
附件 附件编号，value以字符串格式传入 ["4960216b-8dd9-499e-86f2-3035c9445c96", "4960216b-8dd9-499e-86f2-3035c9445c96"]
层级选择 选项层级、选项值，以及和选项路径所有节点的选项层级、选项值。选项层级以数字传入，选项值为字符串 [{"level": "1", "value": "选项1"}, {"level": "2", "value:": "选项1-1"}]
关联字段 value以字符串格式传入 关联字段值
表格 每一行根据序号值区分，每一行中，每个表格值将titleCode和value 传入 Json格式字符串 [{"sequence": 1, "columnValues": [{"titleCode": "NAME", "value": "张三"}, {"titleCode": "AGE", "value": "26"}]},{"sequence": 2, "columnValues": [{"titleCode": "NAME", "value": "李四"}, {"titleCode": "AGE", "value": "28"}]}]
人员 value 以花名册编号传入 Json格式字符串 ["EMP_NUMBER_01", "EMP_NUMBER_02"]
单据部门 组织编码以字符串形式传入 00000001
单据项目 value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串 ["PROJECT_1", "PROJECT_2"]
关联单据 费控系统单据编号，以字符串形式传入 2023080202288221
申请金额 小数位和整数位以自定义字段配置为准，value以字符串格式传入 66.6
城市 城市编码，以字符串形式传入 20
供应商 value以供应商编号传入 SUP20211109091900
客户 value以客户编号传入 Json格式字符串 ["CUSTOMER_01", "CUSTOMER_02"]
合同 value以合同编号传入 8768768768768
成本中心 value以成本中心编号传入 center001
档案选择 value以自定义档案选项编码传入 option01
部门 value以薪福通组织编码传入 Json格式字符串 ["ORG_01", "ORG_02"]
项目 value以项目编码传入 Json格式字符串 ["PROJECT_1", "PROJECT_2"]
事业部 value以薪福通组织编码传入 00000211
事项 配置为必填时，业务类型编码必传，且下级存在事项和事由时，事项编码和事由编码必传。value以“业务类型编码,事项编码,事由编码”传入 Json格式字符串 ["MATTER_TYPE_1", "MATTER_MISSION_1", "MATTER_DETAIL_1"]
收款账户 value以个人或供应商银行账户号，开户行，户名传入 Json格式字符串；匹配启用状态的个人或供应商收款账户 ["62256255478532541", "中国银行", "小朱"]

调用方式

METHOD: POST

| 错误码| 错误信息| | --- | --- | | E0001| 单据公司和单据部门需要同时指定或者同时为空 | | E0001| 请传入企业用户ID| | E0001| 请传入花名册员工号| | E0001| 请传入正确的员工匹配规则| | E0001| 暂不支持除草稿、待审批、审批通过之外的单据状态| | E0001| 表单不存在| | E0001| 请填写正确的预付金额 | | E0001| 请填写正确的已核销金额| | E0001| 已核销金额不能大于预付金额 | | E0001| 存在前款未清，禁止提交| | E0001| 请填写预付理由| | E0001| 您选择的币种不可用,请确认后重试| | E0001| 预付款单本位币计算出错，请刷新后重试| | E0001| 选择的合同不存在 | | E0001| 合同的乙方公司和所选供应商未对应| | E0001| 合同条款不存在|
